title: Rich Smoky Venezuelan Beef Tagine
description: A smoky and cozy Venezuelan dish featuring tender beef and crunchy vegetables, served with a pat of chilled butter.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in the bottom of a clay or ceramic tagine or a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is softened and lightly browned, about 8 minutes.
Add the chopped bell pepper and cook until it is tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the beef brisket and cook until it is browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, ground cumin, brown sugar, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped tomato and beef broth, and bring the mixture to a boil.
Cover the tagine or Dutch oven and transfer it to the oven, where it will cook at 300 degrees for 2 1/2 hours.
Remove the tagine or Dutch oven from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Serve the beef and vegetables hot, topped with a pat of chilled butter.
